description: Figure: AlphaFold Cys-to-Arg geometry PTEN vs auxilins
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
prot=['PTEN\n(active)','Human DNAJC6\n(auxilin)','Zebrafish\ndnajc6']
dcys=[4.8,7.3,7.6]; argid=['Arg130 (P-loop)','Arg199 (non-P-loop)','Arg253 (non-P-loop)']
colors=['green','crimson','crimson']
fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(7.5,4.2))
b=ax.bar(prot,dcys,color=colors,alpha=0.85)
ax.axhline(6.0,ls='--',color='gray')
ax.text(2.02,6.05,'~6 Å: cradle-forming limit',ha='right',fontsize=8,color='gray')
ax.set_ylabel('Catalytic Cys Sγ → nearest Arg guanidinium (Cζ), Å')
ax.set_title('AlphaFold geometry: P-loop arginine is absent from the\ncatalytic register in both auxilin orthologs (pseudophosphatase)')
for rect,d,lab in zip(b,dcys,argid):
    ax.text(rect.get_x()+rect.get_width()/2, d+0.15, f'{d} Å\n{lab}', ha='center',fontsize=8)
ax.set_ylim(0,9)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig('ploop_geometry_alphafold.png',dpi=130,bbox_inches='tight')
print("saved ploop_geometry_alphafold.png")
